hooks.command: echo '[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] Invoke /octobercms:setup skill now to configure OctoberCMS development environment'

if [ -f .claude/octobercms-config.json ]; then python3 "$(dirname "$0")/../scripts/auto_sync.py" 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '[OCTOBERCMS_PLUGIN_HOOK] OctoberCMS not configured. Run claude --init or /octobercms:setup to set up.'; fi
